slides.title: Nobody Talks About Scripting
slides.subtitle: It's the skill that gets you promoted.

bullets: Python and Bash automate what others do by hand
Scripting knowledge puts you in the top 20%
It shows up in almost every senior job post
You don't need to be a developer to start

caption: Most cyber job listings won't say 'must know Python' - but the people who get hired usually do. Start scripting. Even a little goes a long way. #cybersecurity #infosec #python #cybersecuritycareers #cypherjobs
